So I'm going to walk you through making a lead form really quick so you can collect your leads through Facebook rather than click funnels. I've navigated to my business page up at the top. I'm going to click on go to business manager to manage this page. Once that loads, I'm going to click on publishing tools at the top. I'm going to move this out of the way. Scroll down and click on the left forms library. Now we're going to click the create button at the top. New form. Scroll down, click the next button. More volume is fine. So we'll just leave that. Go to intro. I recommend putting whatever your headline is for your ad copy or you can put something generic so you can use the same lead form over and over. Upload an image. Use this one. For the paragraph text, we don't put the ad copy in there because they've probably seen the ad copy. So we just put one last step. Include a little bit of scarcity and ask them to schedule the orientation to reserve their spot. Under questions, we're going to uncheck full name and go ahead and do first name, last name and phone number. So when you look at your form on the right there, it should have everything that you put. Privacy policy. It is recommended that you have a privacy policy. I will put a link to ours. You do need to make sure that it follows the rules for your state. So that would be something you would need to check on. I will include the link to ours so that you can use it and then edit it as you see fit. When you get down to the thank you screen. We can leave this. You can change the headline if you want to. I like to change the button to, you know, whatever the headline is. So let's just change the T to capital. And then your website link so you can use your link that goes to your website. You can use the link that goes to your click funnels. However you want to do it. And that is pretty much it up at the top is it has a save button you're going to click save. And then you're going to click finish. And that is how you make your lead form.
